---
title: "test_muninn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_muninn.py"
loc: 38
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.40
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.91
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestMuninnDaemon, test_deterministic_command_routing. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)

### Exports
- `TestMuninnDaemon`
- `test_deterministic_command_routing`
- `test_uplink_fallback_on_low_confidence`
- `test_sleep_protocol_persistence`
